name: Create: No Unlimited Energy
description: Create's free, easy energy is the bug — Create: NUE deepens it. Water wheels generate power only from genuine FLOWING water, scaled by flow strength, head (drop height) and biome, with a water-as-fuel tax that makes sealed perpetual-motion loops run dry. Windmills become VARIABLE wind: a visible rotor speed driven by gusts, weather and the day/night cycle, with power set by placement; big dams reward megastructure builds. Optional ComputerCraft peripherals expose live telemetry of every wheel, windmill and gauge so you can build your own control logic.
